summary: Frontend refactoring verification complete - All modular CVE dashboard components loading correctly with no console errors. InfraTab, SLATrackerTab, ReportingTab, GovernanceTab, and shared components all verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring successfully decomposed monolithic files into modular sub-directories
All barrel exports (index.js) properly configured for clean imports
Shared components (ChartTooltip, LoadingStates, CodeBlock, Collapsible, RiskGauge) extracted correctly
Shared constants (CHART_COLORS, PIE_COLORS, STATUS_CHART_COLORS) centralized properly
GovernanceTab updated to use shared component imports without issues

No console errors detected.
